<?xml version="1.0"?>
<root main_tree_to_execute="Monitoring">
    <!-- ////////// -->
    <BehaviorTree ID="ConfigureMonitoring">
        <Sequence>
            <Fallback>
                <Condition ID="MonitoringReconfigured"/>
                <Sequence>
                    <SetBlackboard name="ResetParameter" output_key="parameter_set" value="NOT_SET"/>
                    <SetBlackboard name="ResetRTABMAP" output_key="rtabmap_strike" value="0"/>
                </Sequence>
            </Fallback>
            <IfThenElse>
                <Condition ID="Charging"/>
                <Fallback>
                    <BlackboardCheckString return_on_mismatch="FAILURE" value_A="{parameter_set}" value_B="CHARGING">
                        <AlwaysSuccess/>
                    </BlackboardCheckString>
                    <Sequence>
                        <Action ID="ReconfigureMonitoring" parameter_set="CHARGING" parameter_set_out="{parameter_set}"/>
                        <ForceSuccess>
                            <Sequence>
                                <Action ID="Speak" text="Gute Nacht!"/>
                                <Action ID="FacialExpression" duration="100000" expression="SLEEP"/>
                            </Sequence>
                        </ForceSuccess>
                        <SubTree ID="KillRemainingNodes" __shared_blackboard="false" parameter_set="parameter_set"/>
                    </Sequence>
                </Fallback>
                <Fallback>
                    <BlackboardCheckString return_on_mismatch="FAILURE" value_A="{parameter_set}" value_B="OPERATING">
                        <AlwaysSuccess/>
                    </BlackboardCheckString>
                    <Sequence>
                        <Action ID="ReconfigureMonitoring" parameter_set="OPERATING" parameter_set_out="{parameter_set}"/>
                        <ForceSuccess>
                            <Sequence>
                                <Action ID="Speak" text="Guten Morgen!"/>
                                <Action ID="FacialExpression" duration="5.0" expression="NEUTRAL"/>
                            </Sequence>
                        </ForceSuccess>
                        <SubTree ID="KillRemainingNodes" __shared_blackboard="false" parameter_set="parameter_set"/>
                    </Sequence>
                </Fallback>
            </IfThenElse>
        </Sequence>
    </BehaviorTree>
    <!-- ////////// -->
    <BehaviorTree ID="KillRemainingNodes">
        <KeepRunningUntilFailure>
            <Sequence>
                <Action ID="SetKillGroups" curr_kill_group="{curr_group}" parameter_set="{parameter_set}"/>
                <ForceSuccess>
                    <Sequence>
                        <Action ID="KillNodeFromGroup" group="{curr_group}" kill_node="{curr_node}"/>
                        <Action ID="KillROSNode" node="{curr_node}"/>
                    </Sequence>
                </ForceSuccess>
            </Sequence>
        </KeepRunningUntilFailure>
    </BehaviorTree>
    <!-- ////////// -->
    <BehaviorTree ID="Monitoring">
        <Sequence>
            <SubTree ID="ConfigureMonitoring" __shared_blackboard="false" rtabmap_strike="rtabmap_strike"/>
            <Action ID="Monitoring" blocked_groups="{blocked_groups}" description="{desc}" error_level="{err}" key="{key}"/>
            <SubTree ID="ProcessStatus" __shared_blackboard="false" desc="desc" err="err" key="key" status="status"/>
            <Fallback name="ErrorType">
                <Sequence>
                    <Condition ID="RTABMapMonitor" description="{desc}"/>
                    <SubTree ID="RTABMapHandling" __shared_blackboard="false" key="key" rtabmap_strike="rtabmap_strike" status="status"/>
                </Sequence>
                <Sequence>
                    <Condition ID="MoveBaseMonitor" description="{desc}"/>
                    <SetBlackboard output_key="key" value="/move_base"/>
                    <SubTree ID="RestartNode" __shared_blackboard="false" blocked_groups="blocked_groups" desc="desc" key="key" status="status"/>
                </Sequence>
                <Sequence>
                    <Condition ID="NodeMonitor" description="{desc}"/>
                    <SubTree ID="RestartNode" __shared_blackboard="false" blocked_groups="blocked_groups" desc="desc" key="key" status="status"/>
                </Sequence>
            </Fallback>
        </Sequence>
    </BehaviorTree>
    <!-- ////////// -->
    <BehaviorTree ID="ProcessStatus">
        <Fallback>
            <Sequence>
                <Condition ID="StatusInfo" description="{desc}" error_level="{err}" key="{key}"/>
                <Action ID="StatusToParamServer" description="{desc}" key="{key}" rewrite_stamp="true"/>
                <SetBlackboard output_key="status" value="INFO"/>
                <Action ID="ROSOut" level="INFO" msg="Everything ok!" throttle_period="120"/>
            </Sequence>
            <Sequence>
                <Condition ID="StatusWarn" description="{desc}" error_level="{err}" key="{key}"/>
                <Action ID="StatusToParamServer" description="{desc}" key="{key}" rewrite_stamp="true"/>
                <SetBlackboard output_key="status" value="WARN"/>
            </Sequence>
            <Sequence>
                <Condition ID="StatusError" description="{desc}" error_level="{err}" key="{key}"/>
                <Action ID="StatusToParamServer" description="{desc}" key="{key}" rewrite_stamp="false"/>
                <SetBlackboard output_key="status" value="ERROR"/>
            </Sequence>
        </Fallback>
    </BehaviorTree>
    <!-- ////////// -->
    <BehaviorTree ID="RTABMapHandling">
        <Fallback>
            <BlackboardCheckString return_on_mismatch="FAILURE" value_A="INFO" value_B="{status}">
                <SetBlackboard name="ResetStrike" output_key="rtabmap_strike" value="0"/>
            </BlackboardCheckString>
            <BlackboardCheckString return_on_mismatch="FAILURE" value_A="ERROR" value_B="{status}">
                <Switch4 case_1="0" case_2="1" case_3="2" case_4="3" name="SwitchStrikeCase" variable="{rtabmap_strike}">
                    <Sequence>
                        <Action ID="RotateToRelocalize"/>
                        <Action ID="SaveTimestamp" timestamp="{timestamp}"/>
                        <SetBlackboard name="SetFirstStrike" output_key="rtabmap_strike" value="1"/>
                    </Sequence>
                    <ForceSuccess>
                        <Sequence>
                            <Fallback>
                                <Condition ID="TimePassed" duration="60" timestamp="{timestamp}"/>
                                <ForceFailure>
                                    <Action ID="RotateToRelocalize"/>
                                </ForceFailure>
                            </Fallback>
                            <ForceSuccess>
                                <Sequence>
                                    <SetBlackboard output_key="key" value="/rtabmap/rtabmap"/>
                                    <Sequence name="KillRTABMAP">
                                        <Action ID="GroupFromKey" group="{group}" key="{key}"/>
                                        <Action ID="KillNodeFromGroup" group="{group}" kill_node="{kill_node}"/>
                                        <Action ID="KillROSNode" node="{kill_node}"/>
                                    </Sequence>
                                    <SetBlackboard output_key="key" value="/move_base"/>
                                    <Sequence name="KillMoveBase">
                                        <Action ID="GroupFromKey" group="{group}" key="{key}"/>
                                        <Action ID="KillNodeFromGroup" group="{group}" kill_node="{kill_node}"/>
                                        <Action ID="KillROSNode" node="{kill_node}"/>
                                    </Sequence>
                                </Sequence>
                            </ForceSuccess>
                            <Action ID="SaveTimestamp" timestamp="{timestamp}"/>
                            <SetBlackboard name="SetSecondStrike" output_key="rtabmap_strike" value="2"/>
                        </Sequence>
                    </ForceSuccess>
                    <Sequence>
                        <Action ID="RotateToRelocalize"/>
                        <Action ID="SaveTimestamp" timestamp="{timestamp}"/>
                        <SetBlackboard name="SetThirdStrike" output_key="rtabmap_strike" value="3"/>
                    </Sequence>
                    <Sequence>
                        <Fallback>
                            <Condition ID="TimePassed" duration="60" timestamp="{timestamp}"/>
                            <ForceFailure>
                                <Action ID="RotateToRelocalize"/>
                            </ForceFailure>
                        </Fallback>
                        <Action ID="ROSParamToBlackboard" entry="{localization_msg}" param="localization_lost"/>
                        <IfThenElse name="IfSuccesfulReset">
                            <Action ID="CallSupervisor" message="{localization_msg}"/>
                            <SetBlackboard name="ResetStrike" output_key="rtabmap_strike" value="0"/>
                            <SetBlackboard name="SetFourthStrike" output_key="rtabmap_strike" value="0"/>
                        </IfThenElse>
                    </Sequence>
                    <AlwaysSuccess/>
                </Switch4>
            </BlackboardCheckString>
        </Fallback>
    </BehaviorTree>
    <!-- ////////// -->
    <BehaviorTree ID="RestartNode">
        <BlackboardCheckString name="CheckIfError" return_on_mismatch="FAILURE" value_A="{status}" value_B="ERROR">
            <Sequence>
                <Action ID="GroupFromKey" group="{group}" key="{key}"/>
                <Fallback>
                    <Condition ID="GroupNotBlocked" blocked_groups="{blocked_groups}" group="{group}"/>
                    <ForceFailure>
                        <Action ID="ROSOut" level="INFO" msg="Group still blocked. Restart process skipped." throttle_period="0"/>
                    </ForceFailure>
                </Fallback>
                <Fallback>
                    <Sequence name="KilllSequence">
                        <Action ID="KillNodeFromGroup" group="{group}" kill_node="{kill_node}"/>
                        <Action ID="KillROSNode" node="{kill_node}"/>
                    </Sequence>
                    <Sequence name="LaunchSequence">
                        <Action ID="LaunchFileFromGroup" group="{group}" launch_file="{launch_file}" pkg="{pkg}"/>
                        <Action ID="StartLaunchFile" blocked_groups="{blocked_groups}" group_block="{group}" launch_file="{launch_file}" pkg="{pkg}"/>
                        <Delay delay_msec="500">
                            <AlwaysSuccess/>
                        </Delay>
                        <Action ID="ROSOut" level="INFO" msg="Launch file started" throttle_period="0"/>
                    </Sequence>
                </Fallback>
            </Sequence>
        </BlackboardCheckString>
    </BehaviorTree>
    <!-- ////////// -->
    <TreeNodesModel>
        <Action ID="CallSupervisor">
            <input_port name="message" type="std::string"/>
        </Action>
        <Condition ID="Charging"/>
        <SubTree ID="ConfigureMonitoring">
            <input_port default="false" name="__shared_blackboard">If false (default), the Subtree has an isolated blackboard and needs port remapping</input_port>
            <input_port default="rtabmap_strike" name="rtabmap_strike"/>
        </SubTree>
        <Condition ID="CpuMonitor">
            <input_port name="description"/>
        </Condition>
        <Action ID="DeleteStatus">
            <input_port name="key" type="std::string"/>
        </Action>
        <Action ID="ErrorIsNew">
            <input_port name="description" type="std::string"/>
            <input_port name="key" type="std::string"/>
        </Action>
        <Action ID="FacialExpression">
            <input_port name="duration" type="double"/>
            <input_port name="expression" type="std::string"/>
        </Action>
        <Action ID="GroupFromKey">
            <output_port name="group" type="std::string"/>
            <input_port name="key" type="std::string"/>
        </Action>
        <Action ID="GroupFromTopic">
            <output_port name="group"/>
            <input_port name="topic"/>
        </Action>
        <Condition ID="GroupNotBlocked">
            <input_port name="blocked_groups" type="std::map<std::__cxx11::basic_string<char, std::char_traits<char>, std::allocator<char> >, ros::Time, std::less<std::__cxx11::basic_string<char, std::char_traits<char>, std::allocator<char> > >, std::allocator<std::pair<std::__cxx11::basic_string<char, std::char_traits<char>, std::allocator<char> > const, ros::Time> > >"/>
            <input_port name="group" type="std::string"/>
        </Condition>
        <Action ID="KillNodeFromGroup">
            <input_port name="group" type="std::string"/>
            <output_port name="kill_node" type="std::string"/>
        </Action>
        <Action ID="KillROSNode">
            <input_port name="node" type="std::string"/>
        </Action>
        <SubTree ID="KillRemainingNodes">
            <input_port default="false" name="__shared_blackboard">If false (default), the Subtree has an isolated blackboard and needs port remapping</input_port>
            <input_port name="parameter_set"/>
        </SubTree>
        <Action ID="LaunchFileFromGroup">
            <input_port name="group" type="std::string"/>
            <output_port name="launch_file" type="std::string"/>
            <output_port name="pkg" type="std::string"/>
        </Action>
        <Action ID="Monitoring">
            <inout_port name="blocked_groups" type="std::map<std::__cxx11::basic_string<char, std::char_traits<char>, std::allocator<char> >, ros::Time, std::less<std::__cxx11::basic_string<char, std::char_traits<char>, std::allocator<char> > >, std::allocator<std::pair<std::__cxx11::basic_string<char, std::char_traits<char>, std::allocator<char> > const, ros::Time> > >"/>
            <output_port name="description" type="std::string"/>
            <output_port name="error_level" type="double"/>
            <output_port name="key" type="std::string"/>
        </Action>
        <Condition ID="MonitoringReconfigured"/>

            <input_port name="description" type="std::string"/>

            <input_port default="err" name="err"/>
            <input_port default="key" name="key"/>
            <output_port default="status" name="status"/>

            <input_port name="description" type="std::string"/>
        </Condition>
        <Condition ID="RamMonitor">
            <input_port name="description"/>
        </Condition>
        <Action ID="ReconfigureMonitoring">
            <input_port name="parameter_set" type="std::string"/>
            <output_port name="parameter_set_out" type="std::string"/>
        </Action>
        <SubTree ID="RestartNode">
            <input_port default="false" name="__shared_blackboard">If false (default), the Subtree has an isolated blackboard and needs port remapping</input_port>
            <input_port default="blocked_groups" name="blocked_groups"/>
            <input_port default="desc" name="desc"/>
            <input_port default="key" name="key"/>
            <input_port default="status" name="status"/>
        </SubTree>
        <Action ID="RotateToRelocalize"/>
        <Action ID="SaveTimestamp">
            <output_port name="timestamp" type="double"/>
        </Action>
        <Action ID="SendMessage">
            <input_port name="message">Message to send</input_port>
            <input_port default="TELEGRAM" name="service">Service to use. Can be {EMAIL, TELEGRAM}</input_port>
        </Action>
        <Action ID="SetDelayAfterLaunch">
            <output_port default="{delay}" name="delay"/>
            <input_port default="{launch_file}" name="launch_file"/>
        </Action>
        <Action ID="SetKillGroups">
            <output_port name="curr_kill_group" type="std::string"/>
            <input_port name="parameter_set" type="std::string"/>
        </Action>
        <Action ID="Speak">
            <input_port name="text" type="std::string"/>
        </Action>
        <Action ID="StartLaunchFile">
            <inout_port name="blocked_groups" type="std::map<std::__cxx11::basic_string<char, std::char_traits<char>, std::allocator<char> >, ros::Time, std::less<std::__cxx11::basic_string<char, std::char_traits<char>, std::allocator<char> > >, std::allocator<std::pair<std::__cxx11::basic_string<char, std::char_traits<char>, std::allocator<char> > const, ros::Time> > >"/>
            <input_port name="group_block" type="std::string"/>
            <input_port name="launch_file" type="std::string"/>
            <input_port name="pkg" type="std::string"/>
        </Action>
        <Action ID="StartLaunchFiles">
            <output_port name="launch_file"/>
            <output_port name="pkg"/>
        </Action>
        <Condition ID="StatMonitor">
            <input_port name="description"/>
        </Condition>
        <Condition ID="StatusError">
            <input_port name="description" type="std::string"/>
            <input_port name="error_level" type="double"/>
            <input_port name="key" type="std::string"/>
        </Condition>
        <Condition ID="StatusInfo">
            <input_port name="description" type="std::string"/>
            <input_port name="error_level" type="double"/>
            <input_port name="key" type="std::string"/>
        </Condition>
        <Action ID="StatusToParamServer">
            <input_port name="description" type="std::string"/>
            <input_port name="key" type="std::string"/>
            <input_port name="rewrite_stamp" type="bool"/>
        </Action>
        <Condition ID="StatusWarn">
            <input_port name="description" type="std::string"/>
            <input_port name="error_level" type="double"/>
            <input_port name="key" type="std::string"/>
        </Condition>
        <Condition ID="TimePassed">
            <input_port name="duration" type="double"/>
            <input_port name="timestamp" type="double"/>
        </Condition>
        <Condition ID="TopicMonitor">
            <input_port name="description"/>
        </Condition>
    </TreeNodesModel>
    <!-- ////////// -->
</root>

<root main_tree_to_execute = "PegTree" >
    <BehaviorTree ID="PegTree">
    <ReactiveFallback name="root_sequence">
        <ReactiveSequence name="peg_insertion_check">
            <EEYThreshold   name="ee_y_threshold" threshold="{y_threshold}" ee_y="{ee_y}" above="false"/>
            <ReactiveFallback name="peg_insertion">
                <ReactiveSequence name="goal_condition">
                    <EEPositionDistance name="goal_check"
                        threshold="0.05"
                        target_x="-0.6"
                        target_y="0.0"
                        target_z="0.64"
                        ee_x="{ee_x}"
                        ee_y="{ee_y}"
                        ee_z="{ee_z}"/>
                    <Parallel name="mg_config_goal_and_check" success_threshold="1" failure_threshold="1">
                        <SetMGSin   name="mg_sinus"
                            mp_ampl="0"
                            mp_freq="0"
                            mg_ampl="{mg_ampl}"
                            mg_freq="{mg_freq}"/>
                        <SetMGGoal   name="mg_goal1"
                            mp_param_x="-0.6"
                            mp_param_y="0.0"
                            mp_param_z="0.73"
                            mg_trans_x="{mg_trans_x}"
                            mg_trans_y="{mg_trans_y}"
                            mg_trans_z="{mg_trans_z}"/>
                        <EEPositionDistance name="goal_check"
                            threshold="0.05"
                            target_x="-0.6"
                            target_y="0.0"
                            target_z="0.64"
                            ee_x="{ee_x}"
                            ee_y="{ee_y}"
                            ee_z="{ee_z}"/>
                    </Parallel>
                </ReactiveSequence>
                <ReactiveSequence name="search_motion">
                    <EEZThreshold   name="ee_z_threshold" threshold="{z_peg_threshold}" ee_z="{ee_z}" above="false"/>
                        <SetMGSin   name="mg_sinus"
                            mp_ampl="{mp_ampl}"
                            mp_freq="{mp_freq}"
                            mg_ampl="{mg_ampl}"
                            mg_freq="{mg_freq}"/>
                </ReactiveSequence>
                <Parallel name="mg_config" success_threshold="1" failure_threshold="1">
                    <SetMGSin   name="mg_sinus"
                        mp_ampl="0"
                        mp_freq="0"
                        mg_ampl="{mg_ampl}"
                        mg_freq="{mg_freq}"/>
                    <SetMGGoal   name="mg_goal1"
                        mp_param_x="{mp_3_x}"
                        mp_param_y="{mp_3_y}"
                        mp_param_z="{mp_3_z}"
                        mg_trans_x="{mg_trans_x}"
                        mg_trans_y="{mg_trans_y}"
                        mg_trans_z="{mg_trans_z}"/>
                </Parallel>
            </ReactiveFallback>
        </ReactiveSequence>
        <ReactiveSequence name="2-traverse">
            <EEZThreshold   name="ee_z_threshold" threshold="{z_threshold}" ee_z="{ee_z}" above="true"/>
            <Parallel name="mg_config" success_threshold="1" failure_threshold="1">
                <SetMGSin   name="mg_sinus"
                        mp_ampl="0"
                        mp_freq="0"
                        mg_ampl="{mg_ampl}"
                        mg_freq="{mg_freq}"/>
                <SetMGGoal   name="mg_goal2"
                    mp_param_x="{mp_2_x}"
                    mp_param_y="{mp_2_y}"
                    mp_param_z="{mp_2_z}"
                    mg_trans_x="{mg_trans_x}"
                    mg_trans_y="{mg_trans_y}"
                    mg_trans_z="{mg_trans_z}"/>
            </Parallel>
        </ReactiveSequence>
        <Parallel name="mg_config" success_threshold="1" failure_threshold="1">
                <SetMGSin   name="mg_sinus"
                    mp_ampl="0"
                    mp_freq="0"
                    mg_ampl="{mg_ampl}"
                    mg_freq="{mg_freq}"/>
                <SetMGGoal   name="mg_goal1"
                    mp_param_x="{mp_1_x}"
                    mp_param_y="{mp_1_y}"
                    mp_param_z="{mp_1_z}"
                    mg_trans_x="{mg_trans_x}"
                    mg_trans_y="{mg_trans_y}"
                    mg_trans_z="{mg_trans_z}"/>
            </Parallel>
    </ReactiveFallback>
    </BehaviorTree>
</root>
mrq:
The mission describes a reactive peg insertion and traversal task that adjusts motion goals and micro-gestures based on end-effector position checks.

First, the robot will execute the following actions [peg_insertion_check, 2-traverse, mg_config] in order. If peg_insertion_check succeeds, it will stop execution. Else it will keep executing and re-evaluating previous actions whenever an action is running.

Next, it will execute the following actions [ee_y_threshold, peg_insertion] in sequence. If ee_y_threshold fails, it will stop execution. While peg_insertion is still running, it will re-evaluate ee_y_threshold.

Next, it will read blackboard values for ee_y and the threshold and will find a value on the blackboard and check if it matches a given rule. It will treat the check as the custom action EEYThreshold with parameter above set to false.

Next, it will execute the following actions [goal_condition, search_motion, mg_config] in order. If goal_condition succeeds, it will stop execution. Else it will keep executing and re-evaluating previous actions whenever an action is running.

Next, it will execute the following actions [goal_check, mg_config_goal_and_check] in sequence. If goal_check fails, it will stop execution. While mg_config_goal_and_check is still running, it will re-evaluate goal_check.

Next, it will run the custom action EEPositionDistance to check the end-effector distance to the target at coordinates (-0.6, 0.0, 0.64) with a threshold of 0.05.

Next, it will execute the following actions [mg_sinus, mg_goal1, goal_check] simultaneously. If either a success threshold is reached or all actions succeed, the execution was successful. Else if any action fails, the execution fails. It will run the custom action SetMGSin with zero motion-primitives amplitude and frequency and with provided micro-gesture parameters. It will run the custom action SetMGGoal to command a motion goal at (-0.6, 0.0, 0.73) with provided transforms. It will run the custom action EEPositionDistance to verify the same target at (-0.6, 0.0, 0.64) with the same threshold.

Next, it will execute the following actions [ee_z_threshold, mg_sinus] in sequence. If ee_z_threshold fails, it will stop execution. While mg_sinus is still running, it will re-evaluate ee_z_threshold.

Next, it will read blackboard values for ee_z and the threshold and will find a value on the blackboard and check if it matches a given rule. It will treat the check as the custom action EEZThreshold with parameter above set to false.

Next, it will run the custom action SetMGSin with provided motion-primitives amplitude and frequency and with provided micro-gesture parameters.

Next, it will execute the following actions [mg_sinus, mg_goal1] simultaneously. If either a success threshold is reached or all actions succeed, the execution was successful. Else if any action fails, the execution fails. It will run the custom action SetMGSin with zero motion-primitives amplitude and frequency and with provided micro-gesture parameters. It will run the custom action SetMGGoal to command a motion goal at ({mp_3_x}, {mp_3_y}, {mp_3_z}) with provided transforms.

Next, it will execute the following actions [ee_z_threshold, mg_config] in sequence. If ee_z_threshold fails, it will stop execution. While mg_config is still running, it will re-evaluate ee_z_threshold.

Next, it will read blackboard values for ee_z and the threshold and will find a value on the blackboard and check if it matches a given rule. It will treat the check as the custom action EEZThreshold with parameter above set to true.

Next, it will execute the following actions [mg_sinus, mg_goal2] simultaneously. If either a success threshold is reached or all actions succeed, the execution was successful. Else if any action fails, the execution fails. It will run the custom action SetMGSin with zero motion-primitives amplitude and frequency and with provided micro-gesture parameters. It will run the custom action SetMGGoal to command a motion goal at ({mp_2_x}, {mp_2_y}, {mp_2_z}) with provided transforms.

Finally, it will execute the following actions [mg_sinus, mg_goal1] simultaneously. If either a success threshold is reached or all actions succeed, the execution was successful. Else if any action fails, the execution fails. It will run the custom action SetMGSin with zero motion-primitives amplitude and frequency and with provided micro-gesture parameters. It will run the custom action SetMGGoal to command a motion goal at ({mp_1_x}, {mp_1_y}, {mp_1_z}) with provided transforms.

BT:
<root main_tree_to_execute="MainTree">
    <BehaviorTree ID="BlinkLight">
        <Sequence>
            <SetLightState state="true" />
            <Delay delay_msec="500">
                <SetLightState state="false" />
            </Delay>
        </Sequence>
    </BehaviorTree>

    <BehaviorTree ID="MainTree">
        <Sequence>
            <ForEachMineralSample samples_list="{mineral_samples}" current_sample="{current_sample}">
                <Sequence>
                    <Log message="Moving to next sample..." />
                    <ResetMineralDepositTracker sample="{current_sample}" service_name="/mineral_deposit_tracker/reset" />
                    <GetSamplePose sample="{current_sample}" pose="{sample_pose}" />
                    <PipelineSequence>
                        <RateController hz="1.0">
                            <Sequence>
                                <GoalUpdater input_goal="{sample_pose}" output_goal="{updated_goal}">
                                    <ComputePathToPose goal="{updated_goal}" path="{path}" planner_id="GridBased" />
                                </GoalUpdater>
                                <TruncatePath distance="1.0" input_path="{path}" output_path="{truncated_path}" />
                            </Sequence>
                        </RateController>
                        <WhileDoElse>
                            <GoalReached goal="{updated_goal}" />
                            <AlwaysSuccess />
                            <KeepRunningUntilFailure>
                                <FollowPath path="{truncated_path}" controller_id="FollowPath" />
                            </KeepRunningUntilFailure>
                        </WhileDoElse>
                    </PipelineSequence>
                    <Log message="At sample!" />
                    <SubTree ID="BlinkLight" __shared_blackboard="true" />
                </Sequence>
            </ForEachMineralSample>
            <Log message="All samples complete" />
            <SubTree ID="BlinkLight" __shared_blackboard="true" />
        </Sequence>
    </BehaviorTree>
</root>
mrq:
The mission describes a sampling task that iterates over mineral samples, navigates to each sample using a reactive path-update pipeline, and signals progress with a light blink.

First, it will execute the following actions (SetLightState, Delay) in order and stop the sequence if any action fails. It will run the custom action SetLightState to turn the light on. It will execute delayed SetLightState and will start a 500-millisecond delay after the inner action succeeds. It will resume and run the custom action SetLightState to turn the light off after the delay elapses.

Next, the robot will execute the following actions (ForEachMineralSample, Log, SubTree) in order and stop the sequence if any action fails. It will execute the custom action ForEachMineralSample to iterate over each item in mineral_samples while setting current_sample for each iteration. It will execute the following actions (Log, ResetMineralDepositTracker, GetSamplePose, PipelineSequence, Log, SubTree) in order and stop the sequence if any action fails for each current_sample. It will run the custom action Log to report that it is moving to the next sample. It will run the custom action ResetMineralDepositTracker to clear deposit tracking for current_sample using the service /mineral_deposit_tracker/reset. It will run the custom action GetSamplePose to obtain the pose of current_sample and store it as sample_pose. It will execute the following actions (RateController, WhileDoElse) in order and stop the sequence if any action fails while advancing on running or success. It will run the custom action RateController at 1.0 Hz and will execute the following actions (GoalUpdater, TruncatePath) in order and stop the sequence if any action fails inside the rate-controlled block. It will run the custom action GoalUpdater to update input_goal from sample_pose into updated_goal while wrapping the ROS action ComputePathToPose that computes a path to updated_goal as path using the GridBased planner. It will run the custom action TruncatePath to shorten path to truncated_path with a 1.0-meter lookahead. It will execute a node while a condition is true else execute an alternative node if that same condition fails. It will find a value on the blackboard and check if it matches a given rule by evaluating GoalReached for updated_goal before each step. It will execute [Action] and make sure it always succeeds when GoalReached is true by running the custom action AlwaysSuccess. It will execute [Action] when GoalReached is false by running the custom action KeepRunningUntilFailure, which will execute the ROS action FollowPath with truncated_path and will restart FollowPath whenever it succeeds until FollowPath fails. It will run the custom action Log to report arrival at the sample after navigation completes. It will execute the subtree BlinkLight while sharing the blackboard to signal arrival. It will run the custom action Log to report that all samples are complete after iterating through all samples. It will execute the subtree BlinkLight while sharing the blackboard to signal mission completion.
